caption: In a bright laboratory or classroom setting, two individuals wearing white lab coats are working at a white table. A woman with blonde hair tied back sits in the background, while a man with short blonde hair is positioned in the foreground. On the table, there are various pieces of equipment, including metal clamps and small tools. The man is focused on a task, using a thin instrument to manipulate an object on the table's surface. Across the sequence, the man's hands move as he carefully adjusts the tool, shifting his grip and position to precisely handle the item. The woman remains seated behind him, also engaged in her own work. In the background, windows reveal a view of brick buildings under a clear sky. There is no legible on-screen text or logos visible throughout the scene.
